email_subject: Re: Reporting delays and next steps
email_body:
Thanks for the demo yesterday. Our team is still spending ~4 hours each week on manual reporting — it's a real bottleneck.

We're also evaluating Competitor X for analytics. IT has asked about SSO and SOC2 before we can pilot.

Who on your side can help us build an internal business case? We don't have a clear champion yet.

Can we get a mutual action plan by end of month?
